source_note_model: Source: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSR Files, OA/ID 90006-029, NSR-14-April 03, 1989-Review of U.S. Arms Control Policies [5]. Secret. Copied to Quayle and Sununu. A stamped notation indicates Bush saw the memorandum; an unknown hand wrote "6/20/89" beneath the notation.

- -SRERET-- NATIONAL SECURITY COUNCIL 20674
WASHINGTON, D.C. 20506 add-on
June 17, 1989
ACTION
MEMORANDUM FOR BRENT SCOWCROFT
THROUGH: ARNOLD KANTER|| eh
FROM: RICHARD DAVISRW
SUBJECT: NST Decisions
At Tab I is a package of NST issues for decision that we did not
include in our June 16 memorandum for you to send to the
President. We recommend that you discuss these issues with the
President in general terms, but not go through the package in
detail.
All issues have been reviewed by the Deputies Committee who agree
that the interagency papers fairly present the options for
decision. This package and the June 16 decision package for the
President include all of the decisions needed for Geneva.
We need decisions on these issues urgently, so we can send
instructions to our negotiators in Geneva.
Bob Blackwill snk rebar Rice concur.
RECOMMENDATION
That you make decisions on the START and Defense & Space issues
presented at Tab I.
Approve Disapprove
Tab I Decision Paper DECLASSIFIED
| White House Guidelines
E.O. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B), September 11, 2006
By cap___ NARA, Date 7/8 [10

Universal deployment run without explicit page range; page span requires human confirmation.
